issue_title: FIXED: Countdown Setting Display on Popup
issue_body_preview:
Issue: When changing the countdown set from 3 seconds to 5/10 seconds, the new countdowns are updated to chrome.storage(). However, when exiting and reloading the popup, the changes are not shown in the popup while the settings have actually changed.

Ex: 
I change the countdown to 10 seconds. I
test_description_zh: 在浏览器扩展弹出窗口中，将倒计时设置从默认的3秒更改为5秒或10秒，然后关闭弹出窗口并重新打开，观察倒计时设置的显示值。
expected_result_zh: 重新打开弹出窗口后，倒计时设置应正确显示之前用户所选择的值（如5秒或10秒），而不是回退显示为默认的3秒。
